zh.lifeSummary: 當John Burnett of Barnes於大約1577年出生在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾曼諾時，他的父親William Burnet33歲，母親Margaret Stewart16歲。他於1610年6月與Margaret Scot在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1643年在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Burnett of Barnes于大约1577年出生在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾曼諾时，他的父亲William Burnet33岁，母亲Margaret Stewart16岁。他于1610年6月与Margaret Scot在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1643年在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Barnes (on the Surrey bank of the Thames in London), named with Old English bere-ærn ‘barn, a storehouse for barley and other grain’, or a topographic name or metonymic occupational name for someone who lived by or worked at a barn or barns, from Middle English barn ‘barn, granary’.

English: variant of Barne, with excrescent -s, derived from either the Middle English personal name Bern, Barn (based on the Scandinavian personal name Biǫrn or Old English Beorn, both from a word meaning ‘warrior’), or from Middle English barn (Old Norse barn) ‘child’. The latter term is found as a byname for men of the upper classes; it might also have had the meaning ‘young man of a prominent family’, like Middle English child (see Child ).
Irish: in Ireland in many cases this is no doubt the English name, but in others it is possibly an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Bearáin ‘descendant of Bearán’, a byname meaning ‘spear’.

variants.name: Barrington
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Barrington. The one in Gloucestershire is named with the Old English personal name Beorn + -ing- denoting association + tūn ‘settlement’. The Somerset placename is of Norman origin, and is probably derived from Barentin in Seine-Maritime, France. The first element of the Cambridgeshire example is the genitive form of an unattested Old English personal name Bāra.
Irish: adopted as an English form of Gaelic Ó Bearáin, ‘descendant of Bearán’ (see Barnes 3 and Barron ).

variants.name: Barns
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Barnes   1-3.

variants.name: Child
meanings: nickname from Middle English child ‘child, infant’ (Old English cild), in various possible applications. The word is found in Old English as a byname, and in Middle English as a widely used affectionate term of address. It was also used as a term of status for a young man of noble birth, although the exact meaning is not clear; in the 13th and 14th centuries it was a technical term used of a young noble awaiting elevation to the knighthood. In other cases it may have been applied as a byname to a youth considerably younger than his brothers or to one who was a minor on the death of his father.
in Kent, possibly a topographic name from Old English cielde ‘spring (water)’, a rare word derived from c(e)ald ‘cold’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Burnett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname (from an Old French diminutive of brun ‘brown’), in origin a nickname referring to brown colouring of hair, complexion, or clothing. As a female first name it may have been chosen in some cases with reference to the plant Sanguisorba minor, known as burnet, whose leaves are used for salad ( compare Sorrel and Fennel ).

variants.name: Burnet
meanings: Transferred use of the surname (from an Old French diminutive of brun ‘brown’), in origin a nickname referring to brown colouring of hair, complexion, or clothing. As a female first name it may have been chosen in some cases with reference to the plant Sanguisorba minor, known as burnet, whose leaves are used for salad ( compare Sorrel and Fennel ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When John Burnett of Barnes was born about 1577, in Manor, Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Burnet, was 33 and his mother, Margaret Stewart, was 16. He married Margaret Scot in June 1610, in Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died about 1643, in Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Burnett of Barnes est né environ 1577, à Manor, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Burnet, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stewart, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Scot en juin 1610, à Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé environ 1643, à Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

Er hat im Juni 1610 in Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Margaret Scot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb um 1643 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Burnett of Barnes è nato il circa 1577 nel Manor, Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Burnet, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Stewart, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Scot nel giugno 1610, nel Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1643, nel Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Burnett of Barnesが約1577年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアマノーで生まれた時，父William Burnetは33歳，母Margaret Stewartは16歳であった。1610年6月にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアでMargaret Scotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は約1643年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Burnett of Barnes(이)가 대략 1577년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Burnet(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Stewart(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1610년 6월 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르에서 Margaret Scot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1643년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Burnett of Barnes nasceu aproximadamente 1577, em Manor, Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Burnet, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stewart, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Scot em junho de 1610, em Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1643, em Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Burnett of Barnes родился около 1577 г. в местности манор, пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Burnet было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stewart, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Scot июнь 1610 г. в местности пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер около 1643 г. в местности пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.
